creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
What is _your_ "clean room environment"?

I test built with poudriere and on redports, and DNSSEC is a default
option, and dnsmasq builds just fine.  libnettle is a requisite if the
DNSSEC option is enabled.

Make sure that nothing overrides LIBS or LDFLAGS. /etc/make.conf comes
to mind.

Please provide me with exact instructions to reproduce your problem.
